narrative:
Springfield V (precinct in Hamilton County) has 938 registered voters, with 46.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a modest Republican lean of 5.2 percentage points.
